allow: Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./data/featured-creations.json''\); console.log\(''mode:'', d.exploreAll.mode, ''| apiUrl:'', JSON.stringify\(d.exploreAll.apiUrl\), ''| viewAllUrl:'', d.exploreAll.viewAllUrl\);")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(''data/featured-creations.json''\)\); ea=d[''exploreAll'']; print\(''mode:'', ea[''mode''], ''| apiUrl:'', repr\(ea[''apiUrl'']\), ''| viewAllUrl:'', ea[''viewAllUrl'']\)")
